nasb.text: Those who live in my house and my maids consider me a stranger. I am a foreigner in their sight.

esv.text: The guests in my house and my maidservants count me as a stranger; I have become a foreigner in their eyes.

cnv.text: 在我家中寄居的和我的婢女，都把我當作外人， 我在他們的眼中是個外族人。

ccb.text: 我的客人和婢女都视我如陌路， 把我当作外族人。
